primary_function: Knowledge and utilities for creating animated GIFs optimized for Slack. Provides constraints, validation tools, and animation concepts. Use when users request animated GIFs for Slack like "make me a GIF of X doing Y for Slack."

authoritative: Slack GIF format requirements and constraints
Animation concepts (bounce, pulse, spin, fade, slide)

suggested_aec_gates: Verify GIF dimensions match Slack requirements (128x128 for emoji, 480x480 for messages)
Confirm FPS is between 10-30 as specified in requirements
Ensure code uses PIL ImageDraw primitives instead of emoji fonts
Verify line widths are 2 or higher for professional appearance
Confirm duration stays under 3 seconds for emoji GIFs
Validate that optimization parameters are applied when file size reduction is requested
Ensure graphics look polished with proper visual depth and color contrast
Verify animation concepts are implemented using mathematical functions rather than templates
trigger_text: Knowledge and utilities for creating animated GIFs optimized for Slack. Provides constraints, validation tools, and animation concepts. Use when users request animated GIFs for Slack like "make me a GIF of X doing Y for Slack."
